    ports-mgmt/pkg_replace: update to 20230202

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/kdeguchi/pkg_replace/releases

     * Replace '\ ' -> '[[:space:]]'.
     * Update man page.
     * Fix variable that should not be enclosed in double quotes.
     * Fix trap action.
     * Fix message about locked packages.
     * Cleanup code.
